title: Treatments and Preservation of Seawater Samples for FISH
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5v5lf","text":"This protocol gives a method for treatment and preservation of seawater samples that will be subject to fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH). Samples are used with fluorescent probes to determine what populations of bacteria or other microbes are present. The filters may also be used to simply count the number of microbes in a sample. Requires varying amounts of 10µm or 200µm filtrate (up to 11.5L for open ocean depth profile) as shown in Table I.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2k38v","text":"Requires varying amounts of 10µm or 200µm filtrate (up to 11.5L for open ocean depth profile) as shown in Table I.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fnnce","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"82n3e","text":"Table I. Samples from open ocean depth profile for FISH. Goal is for cell concentrations of about 106/ml.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":100,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2dov0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"qmbs","text":"   Depth Volume Seawater Volume 37% Formaldehyde # of Reps   10m 150ml 8ml 2   500m 1000ml 54ml 2   1000m 2000ml 108ml 2   2000m 2600ml 140ml 2   Total with reps 11.5 L 620ml 8 filters   ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":3,"length":5},{"style":"bold","offset":9,"length":15},{"style":"bold","offset":25,"length":23},{"style":"bold","offset":49,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":187}],"data":[]},{"key":"7vnoi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3lgqa","text":"Formaldehyde is not a stable reagent. Use the table above to determine how much reagent you will need.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","0_2":"","0_3":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","1_2":"","1_3":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","2_2":"","2_3":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","3_2":"","3_3":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","4_2":"","4_3":"","5_0":"","5_1":"","5_2":"","5_3":""},"colWidths":[null,null,null,null],"data":[["\u003cstrong\u003eDepth\u003c/strong\u003e","\u003cstrong\u003eVolume Seawater\u003c/strong\u003e","\u003cstrong\u003eVolume 37% Formaldehyde\u003c/strong\u003e","\u003cstrong\u003e# of Reps\u003c/strong\u003e"],["10m","150ml","8ml","2"],["500m","1000ml","54ml","2"],["1000m","2000ml","108ml","2"],["2000m","2600ml","140ml","2"],["Total with reps","11.5 L","620ml","8 filters"]],"guid":"B1B086D0457F11E9BAE4CF38B3347E4C","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}}}}
